adjustments.summary: Choose the concrete payment provider and callback/webhook verification contract before Phase 5 begins.
Define the provider-specific credential, secret, and deployment configuration surface for payment initiation and webhook verification.
Confirm the provider-specific receipt/finalization expectations so idempotent posting and receipt issuance can be implemented safely.

notes: Phase 4 established an additive `/management/reporting` surface with source-wise inflow separation, fee-vs-donation visibility, invoice status summaries, and receipt visibility while leaving legacy report routes untouched.
Phase 5 is not safely unblocked because the repository does not define a concrete payment provider or webhook/signature verification contract.
Do not guess the gateway implementation details; wait for the real provider/business decision before adding live payment initiation or finalization code.
